title: Writeback Demo
content: Keep this section human-written only. The AI must not propose changes here.

title: VISION
content: Keep this section human-written only. The AI must not propose changes here.

title: CONTEXT
content:
Simple demo to illustrate the MRCF v2 writeback protocol — permissions, proposals, HISTORY,
task dependencies, and the new v2 sections (INSIGHTS, DECISIONS).

title: STRUCTURE
content:
<!-- proposal: ai:demo-model | 2026-03-25T10:00:00Z | confidence:high
Suggested structure:
- Parser (@mrcf/parser)
- AI integration (@mrcf/ai)
- Renderer (@mrcf/renderer)
- VS Code Extension
reason: matches the four-package architecture defined in the spec
-->

title: PLAN
content:
Phase 1: Run the smoke test to verify parse → validate → render round-trip.
Phase 2: Inspect proposals with the review command.
Phase 3: Accept or reject each proposal and commit the result.

content:

title: DECISIONS
content:
<!-- proposal: ai:demo-model | 2026-03-25T10:10:00Z | confidence:high
[DEC-1]
choice: Keep VISION and CONTEXT as human-only sections
reason: These sections define intent and audience — allowing AI to overwrite them risks drifting away from the original purpose
alternatives: ai-assisted with mandator
